STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_POWER.descr:
[font_size=18]Modifies the damage enemies deal and take. There are 5 Distance levels (default is 3 if no status is applied):
- Very Close (1): +100%.
- Close (2): +50%.
- Normal (3): No modifier (Default).
- Far (4): -15%.
- Very Far (5): -30%.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_POWER.smart:
Distance [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
Attack Damage inflicted and received by this enemy is changed by {Amount:choose(1|2|3|4):+100%|+50%|+0%|−15%|−30%}.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISTANCE_POWER.title: Distance
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLEXIBLE_WORK_SCHEDU: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold].
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-HARDWORKING_SHINIGAM: At the start of your turn, if there is no [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] in your hand, add one to it.

At the start of your turn, if there {Amount:plural:is no|are less than [blue]{Amount}[/blue]} [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold] in the [gold]Hand[/gold], add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold]|[gold]Manipulate Distances[/gold]} to the [gold]Hand[/gold]{Amount:plural:.| until there are [blue]{Amount}[/blue].}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FLOW_OF_THE_SANZU_RI:
Each time an enemy is [gold]Displaced[/gold]:
- If the [gold]Distance[/gold] was increased, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Dexterity this turn.
- If the [gold]Distance[/gold] was decreased, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-PUSH_N_PULL_POWER.sm:
At the start of {OwnerName}'s turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] all enemies by [blue]-{Amount}[/blue].
At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] all enemies by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_GARDEN_POW: Whenever a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold] is created, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_TACTICS_PO: Whenever [gold]Distance[/gold] is changed by [gold]Manipulate Distance[/gold], add {Amount} random card{Amount:plural:|s} to the hand. If Distance was reduced, add an Attack card. If it was increased, add a Skill card.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VENGEFUL_SPIRIT_POWE:
First Applied with a duration of 3.
Reduce duration by [blue]1[/blue] at the start of the turn.
When removed, [gold]Detonates[/gold] and deals double its current amount as attack damage (affected by modifiers) to its owner.

At the start of {OwnerName}'s turn, reduce duration of [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
{Duration:plural:At the start of its next turn|After [blue]{Duration}[/blue] turns}, [gold]Detonate[/gold] and deal double its amount as attack damage. 
[blue]{VengefulDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage will be dealt.
Applied by Player {ApplierName}.
At the end of your turn, attack the enemy with the lowest HP equal to the amount of [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold], then reduce it by 1.
At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, attack [blue]{GuidedDamage:diff()}[/blue] the enemy with the lowest HP ([blue]{targetName}[/blue]), then reduce it by 1.
At the end of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] equal to the amount of [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold], then halve it (rounding down).
At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue], then halve [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold] (rounding down)
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-LONELY_BOUND_SPIRIT_:
Whenever [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are applied, increase the count of [gold]Lonely Bound Spirit[/gold] by the same amount.
[gold]Lonely Bound Spirit[/gold] will only be detonated when [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold] on its owner with a card effect.
When detonated at the same time as [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold], effects that count the amount of spirits detonated will count both detonations.

Whenever [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are applied on {OwnerName}, increase the count of [gold]Lonely Bound Spirit[/gold] by the same amount * {Amount}.
Will only be detonated when [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are detonated on {OwnerName} with a card effect, dealing [blue]{VengefulDamage}[/blue] damage.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-TALKATIVE_FERRYMAN_P: At the start of {OwnerName}'s turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-VERY_TALKATIVE_FERRY: At the start of {OwnerName}'s next turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold], then remove this.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-FOREVER_CANCELLED_PO: Each time [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] are [gold]Detonated[/gold] on an enemy, apply [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] to that target equal to [gold]{Amount}%[/gold] of the amount (rounding up).
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BOUND_SPIRITS_OF_EAR: At the end of {OwnerName}'s turn, apply {Amount} [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] on each enemy that already has it.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] at the start of each turn.
Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-ETHICALLY_SOURCED_BR: {TurnsRemaining:choose(0|1):At the start of your next turn, gain {ManaGain:energyIcons()} Mana.|At the start of your next turn, end your turn. At the start of your turn after that, gain {ManaGain:energyIcons()} Mana.|At the start of your next {TurnsRemaining} turns, end your turn. At the start of your turn after that, gain {ManaGain:energyIcons()} Mana.}
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-INFERNO_TEMPEST_POWE: At the start of your turn, choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] non-[gold]Basic[/gold] cards to return.
Choose up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards to return randomly amongst the [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw[/gold] pile, and [gold]Discard[/gold] Pile.
Whenever you play a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold], add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Maul{Amount:plural:|s}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-GOLD_SARCOPHAGALLEY_: After [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turn{Amount:plural:|s}, at the start of that turn, return [blue]{CardName}[/blue] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] [gold]Upgraded[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISPLACE_NEXT_TURN_P: At the start of the turn, [gold]Displace[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-POSSESSED_ARMAMENT_P: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vengeful Spirit{Amount:plural:|s}[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RIVERSIDE_VIEW_POWER:
At the start of your turn, if there {Amount:plural:is no [gold]Spider Lily[/gold]|are less than [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Spider Lilies[/gold]} in the [gold]Hand[/gold], add {Amount:plural:a [gold]Spider Lily[/gold]|[gold]Spider Lilies[/gold]} to the [gold]Hand[/gold]{Amount:plural:.| until there are [blue]{Amount}[/blue].}
[gold]Spider Lilies[/gold] only give you one [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RECURSIVE_SOULS_POWE: Whenever a card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-SHINIGAMI_FORM_POWER:
Amplifies Distance bonuses.
Close: (1) Enemies take [blue]+{L1Mult}%[/blue] damage. (2) Enemies take [blue]+{L2Mult}%[/blue] damage.
Far: (4) Enemies deal [blue]{L4Mult}%[/blue] damage. (5) Enemies deal [blue]{L5Mult}%[/blue] damage.
Whenever you play a card:
- If an [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card has the same name: You may return one to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. ([gold]{Value2}[/gold] uses left)
- Otherwise, add a [gold]Clone[/gold] to the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile. Its cost is reduced to {Energy:energyIcons()}. ([gold]{Value1}[/gold] uses left.)
Extinct Fauna of the Sanzu River
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-EIKI_FREE_RELEASE_PO: You do not pay the [gold]Release[/gold] cost of cards.
At the start of your turn, add up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card{Amount:plural:|s} from the [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile with an energy cost of [blue]1[/blue] or less to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is removed from combat when played.
Choose up to {Amount} card{Amount:plural:|s} to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {Amount:plural:It is|They are} removed from combat when played.
